assertionResults.fullName: find_in_sorted returns -1 for an empty array
assertionResults.title: returns -1 for an empty array

assertionResults.fullName: find_in_sorted finds the only element in a single-element array
assertionResults.title: finds the only element in a single-element array

assertionResults.fullName: find_in_sorted returns -1 when the value is not in a single-element array
assertionResults.title: returns -1 when the value is not in a single-element array

assertionResults.fullName: find_in_sorted finds the first element in a sorted array
assertionResults.title: finds the first element in a sorted array

assertionResults.fullName: find_in_sorted finds an element in the middle of a sorted array
assertionResults.title: finds an element in the middle of a sorted array

assertionResults.fullName: find_in_sorted finds the last element in a sorted array
assertionResults.title: finds the last element in a sorted array

assertionResults.fullName: find_in_sorted returns -1 when the target is smaller than all elements
assertionResults.title: returns -1 when the target is smaller than all elements

assertionResults.fullName: find_in_sorted returns -1 when the target would be between existing values
assertionResults.title: returns -1 when the target would be between existing values

assertionResults.fullName: find_in_sorted searches correctly in the left half of the array
assertionResults.title: searches correctly in the left half of the array

assertionResults.fullName: find_in_sorted searches correctly in the right half of the array
assertionResults.title: searches correctly in the right half of the array

assertionResults.fullName: find_in_sorted handles arrays with an even number of elements
assertionResults.title: handles arrays with an even number of elements

assertionResults.fullName: find_in_sorted handles arrays with an odd number of elements
assertionResults.title: handles arrays with an odd number of elements

assertionResults.fullName: find_in_sorted returns an index containing the target when duplicate values are present
assertionResults.title: returns an index containing the target when duplicate values are present

assertionResults.fullName: find_in_sorted handles an array where all elements are equal to the target
assertionResults.title: handles an array where all elements are equal to the target

assertionResults.fullName: find_in_sorted does not mutate the original array
assertionResults.title: does not mutate the original array
